data.title: Market Sentiment Cautiously Bullish Amid Low Volatility
data.description: According to PANews, Adam, a macro researcher at Greeks.live, shared insights on the X platform regarding the current market sentiment. The community remains cautiously optimistic, with traders anticipating a continued market uptrend influenced by Saylor's buying activity and lower options pricing. However, some traders are preparing for potential short positions. The key focus is on the $84,000 level, with discussions on whether to adopt protective positions in the current environment of low implied volatility.

data.title: Key Economic Indicators May Influence Federal Reserve's Rate Decisions
data.description: According to PANews, Nexo analyst Iliya Kalchev has highlighted the significance of upcoming economic indicators, including the Consumer Confidence Index, fourth-quarter GDP, initial jobless claims, and next week's crucial Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) inflation data. These figures are expected to play a pivotal role in the Federal Reserve's decision-making regarding interest rate cuts. The market currently appears more confident about the forthcoming economic data. A cooling inflation rate and stable economic conditions could further boost investor interest, potentially driving up Bitcoin and other digital assets.

data.title: Crypto Market Shows Bearish Trend as Funding Rates Decline
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass indicates that the funding rates on major centralized and decentralized exchanges are reflecting a generally bearish sentiment in the cryptocurrency market. Funding rates are a mechanism used by cryptocurrency trading platforms to maintain the balance between contract prices and the prices of the underlying assets, typically applied to perpetual contracts. This system facilitates the exchange of funds between long and short traders, without the trading platform charging a fee, to adjust the cost or profit of holding contracts, ensuring that contract prices remain close to the asset prices.

A funding rate of 0.01% is considered the benchmark rate. When the funding rate exceeds 0.01%, it suggests a bullish market sentiment. Conversely, when the funding rate falls below 0.005%, it indicates a bearish market outlook.

data.title: Global Tariff Concerns Continue to Impact Cryptocurrency Market
data.description: According to PANews, Nansen research analyst Nicolai Sondergaard has indicated that despite numerous positive developments in the cryptocurrency sector, global tariff concerns are expected to continue exerting pressure on the market. Until tariff-related issues are resolved, risk assets may lack clear direction. This resolution could potentially occur between April 2 and July, which would serve as a positive catalyst for the market.

The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has revised its balance of payments standards to incorporate digital assets.

data.title: BANANAS31, SIREN and mubarak are currently the top three coins in Binance voting
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Binance voting page shows: BANANAS31 (21.4%), SIREN (16.9%) and mubarak (12.8%) are temporarily ranked in the top three of Binance voting.
Earlier news, Binance announced the launch of the first voting event, where users can vote for tokens that have completed official due diligence, and the top two tokens will be eligible for Binance listing.

data.title: Wintermute currently holds approximately 7.688 million MUBARAK
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to The Data Nerd, Wintermute wallet holds about 77.688 million MUBARAK tokens, worth $966,000. In addition, Wintermute also holds 164 billion BABYDOGE, 18.82 billion CAT, and 4.549 million TUT.

data.title: Binance names 4 lessons from past airdrop inefficiencies – report
data.description:
